zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecile Stanley 12th ggm於1465年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維 阿爾德利時，她的父親John Stanley26歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Weaver27歲。她於大約1491年與Thomas Venables 12th ggf在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1514年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecile Stanley 12th ggm于1465年出生在英国英格兰爾奧維 阿爾德利时，她的父亲John Stanley26岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Weaver27岁。她于大约1491年与Thomas Venables 12th ggf在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1514年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Cecile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Cecily  , now also quite common in the English-speaking world (usually without the accent). The form   Cecile   is found in 14th‐century English records.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecile Stanley 12th ggm was born in 1465, in Over Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Stanley, was 26 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Weaver, was 27. She married Thomas Venables 12th ggf about 1491, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1514, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecile Stanley 12th ggm est née en 1465, à Over Alderley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stanley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Weaver, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Venables 12th ggf environ 1491, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1514, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecile Stanley 12th ggm 1465 in Over Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Stanley 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Weaver 27. Sie hat um 1491 in England Thomas Venables 12th ggf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1514 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Thomas Venables 12th ggf circa 1491, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1514, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecile Stanley 12th ggmが1465年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー アルダーリーで生まれた時，父John Stanleyは26歳，母Lady Elizabeth Weaverは27歳であった。約1491年にイギリスでThomas Venables 12th ggfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1514年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecile Stanley 12th ggm(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 알델리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stanley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Weaver(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1491년 영국에서 Thomas Venables 12th ggf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecile Stanley 12th ggm nasceu em 1465, em Over Alderley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Stanley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Weaver, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Venables 12th ggf aproximadamente 1491, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1514, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecile Stanley 12th ggm родилась в 1465 г. в местности овир алдирли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Stanley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Weaver, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Venables 12th ggf около 1491 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1514 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
